description: An elegant blockquote block for highlighting customer quotes, expert opinions, or notable excerpts. Displays a styled quotation with attribution and optional avatar. Use for pull quotes, endorsements, or key statements. Layout: large quote text with decorative left border or quotation marks, author info with circular avatar.
label: Blockquote

test_data.quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower. The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.
